title: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Transitional Housing/Shelter * Disabilities Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Disabilities Issues Ex-Offenders Native American Community AIDS/HIV Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COMMUNITY SUPPORTED SHELTERS SAFE SPOT COMMUNITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to alternative shelter. Participants receive 24/7 access to their own Conestoga Hut with a locking door and a common area for day respite, kitchen, and solar charging station. Participants are eligible for social service assistance, basic need assistance, and service navigation assistance. 1160 Grant Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older Hours: Walk in: Tuesday-Friday 1pm-4pm Shelter: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 683-0836 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY SUPPORTED SHELTERS SAFE SPOT COMMUNITY PROGRAM
